← Collection

Silence

When all narratives end —
All recollections
Imaginings dissolve

When all speech
And words
Only fail

When nothing
Is grasped

Atmosphere
starkspacious
Crux
wordlessness
Words
20
Domain
silencedissolution
Ground
apophaticnondual
